name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-102
title: rabbit-cage runtime check_drift_regenerate entry missing producer args
description: rabbit-cage feature.json runtime.Stop[0] declares check_drift_regenerate with target/producer/alert but no args block. After CONTRACT-WAVE-9 fixed the call path in contract.lib.runtime to accept and forward args, the API can now successfully invoke the producer — but rabbit-cage's RUNTIME declaration still passes no args, so generate-claude-md still cannot execute (it requires policy_source + header_source). Fix: add args: {policy_source: '.claude/features/policy', header_source: 'policy-header.json'} to the rabbit-cage RUNTIME entry for check_drift_regenerate. Discovered as an alongside finding during CONTRACT-WAVE-9 audit; out of contract scope.

history.note: Backstop fix bundled with Wave 9 integration: rabbit-cage RUNTIME.Stop check_drift_regenerate entry now passes the producer args block (policy_source + header_source).
